–1. King of Judah, son and successor of Jotham2Ki 15:38;16:1;2Ch 27:9;28:1

  .Kingdom of, invaded by the kings of Syria and Samaria2Ki 16:5,6;2Ch 28:5-8

  .Prophecies concerningIsa 7:13-25
